title: Ontogenetic changes in nucleic acid, protein contents, and growth of larval and juvenile Japanese flounder
author: Tong, Xue Hong
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Figure 5. Changes in RNA content (■) and RNA concentration (◆) of Japanese flounder larvae and juveniles. Values are given as the mean ± SD. The numbers of samples collected each day range from 5 pools of 560 fish initially to 10 individual fish.
